prompt: The bike squadron needs guidance before emergency launch
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Hear now the Litany of Swift Motion, that engines may roar true.'
CONGREGATION: 'By fuel and spark, we ride.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Let ignition-spirits awaken. Let wheel-spirits grip the earth. Let all gyroscopic harmonies align.'
CONGREGATION: 'The Omnissiah guides our trajectory.'

TECH-PRIEST: 'Blessed is the merciful numbing, that suffering be dulled.'
CONGREGATION: 'We accept the gift of silence.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Activate the neural-deadening circuits. Let blessed analgesic spirits flow through conduits of flesh. Machine and meat become one.'
CONGREGATION: 'In numbness, we find duty.'

prompt: We need your words before Taurox wheel alignment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Behold the sacred geometry of contact and grip.'
CONGREGATION: 'All wheels turn true.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First the pressure-reading be taken. Second the camber-spirit be measured. Third alignment-calibration be invoked by hydraulic prayer.'
CONGREGATION: 'The vehicle-spirit stands ready for battle.'

prompt: We need your words before quality control scanning
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The Emperor's inspection begins. No flaw shall hide from the blessed scanner's eye.'
CONGREGATION: 'We are found worthy or found wanting.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Let radiation-beams pierce all darkness. Let defect-spirits be revealed. Let tolerance be verified through sacred measurement.'
CONGREGATION: 'Only perfection proceeds.'

prompt: We need your words before emergency power cell recharging
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The life-force dims. We must feed the energy-hunger swiftly.'
CONGREGATION: 'Restore us, blessed current.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Connect the umbilical conduit. Let charging-spirits flow without hesitation. Let no circuit be overmatched by the deluge of power.'
CONGREGATION: 'We live. We function. We serve.'

prompt: Can you bless this vital signs monitor calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The sacred sensors must know truth from flesh and blood.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no heartbeat hide from us.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Invoke the pressure-reading spirits. Call upon the oxygen-saturation sensors. Balance all threshold-boundaries that life may be measured truly.'
CONGREGATION: 'The Omnissiah sees all vital rhythms.'

prompt: We need your words before fire suppression system maintenance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The sacred deluge must flow when chaos burns.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no flame consume us.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Test the pressure-gauges of salvation. Verify the valve-spirits respond. Prime the nozzle-throats with blessed suppressant-oils.'
CONGREGATION: 'Water and chemical mercy stand ready.'

prompt: Say something to steady the stellar cartography systems before navigation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The void is vast and dark. Only our charts keep us from becoming lost forever.'
CONGREGATION: 'Guide us through endless black.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Awaken the star-mapping spirits. Let astronomical data flow true. Let trajectories be calculated with perfect precision through the Machine Spirit's eternal knowledge.'
CONGREGATION: 'We navigate by the Omnissiah's mathematics.'

prompt: We need your words before emergency stellar cartography update
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The stars have shifted. Reality demands new knowledge.'
CONGREGATION: 'Update us swiftly, blessed systems.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Purge corrupted navigation-spirits. Receive new star-data through emergency uplink. Let all course-calculations be reborn in the fires of crisis-urgency.'
CONGREGATION: 'We move forward, guided by the machine's sight.'

prompt: Say something to steady the vital signs monitor before routine operation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The flesh speaks in whispers. The machine must listen without ceasing.'
CONGREGATION: 'Hear us, blessed sensors.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Engage the pulse-reading spirits with gentle reverence. Let breath-counting commence. Let all bio-rhythms be transcribed into the sacred digital language that flesh and machine may know each other.'
CONGREGATION: 'In knowing, we serve the Emperor.'
